description_long: This is a light gray baseball cap with a classic six-panel construction and a gently curved brim. The crown is rounded and features stitched ventilation eyelets on each panel for breathability. The front of the cap is plain, with no visible logos or decorative elements, giving it a minimalist appearance. The back of the cap has an adjustable plastic snapback closure, allowing for a customizable fit. The stitching is subtle and matches the color of the fabric, contributing to the cap's clean and understated look. The material appears to be a soft, matte fabric, likely cotton or a cotton blend, with a structured yet flexible form.
description: A light gray, six-panel baseball cap with a curved brim and adjustable snapback closure, featuring a minimalist, logo-free design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the smooth, unadorned crown and the gently curved brim with matching stitching.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the rounded crown, side ventilation eyelets, and the curvature of the brim.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the adjustable snapback closure and the open back section for size adjustment.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the crown's contour, side eyelets, and brim profile.
